summary: HPE iLO Stale-But-Good Fallback feature testing completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). All features verified: hpe_ilo profile with 44 OIDs + 17 Redfish endpoints + generations metadata, fingerprint API matching HP patterns correctly, _keep_if_empty stale fallback logic, ilo-fan-critical runbook with profile_keys=['hpe_ilo'] and capability_match=['hardware_oob','thermal_detail']. Frontend: Device Profiles page shows HPE iLO with 44 OID + API badges, fingerprint tester modal working, Channel Health iLO page functional.

minor.issue: Old ilo-fan-critical runbook in DB was missing profile_keys=['hpe_ilo'] and capability_match=['thermal_detail'] - FIXED by deleting and re-seeding

critical_code_review_comments: device_profiles/__init__.py: hpe_ilo profile correctly defined with 44 OIDs (11 common + 33 CPQHLTH-MIB), 17 Redfish api_endpoints, generations metadata (gen9/gen10/gen11)
redfish.py lines 786-809: _keep_if_empty() function correctly implements stale-but-good fallback - marks items with stale=true when new list is empty but prev list has data
redfish.py lines 801-817: storage_controllers, memory_dimms, network_adapters all use _keep_if_empty() + track storage_last_good_at/memory_last_good_at/network_last_good_at timestamps
routes/runbooks.py: ilo-fan-critical seed has profile_keys=['hpe_ilo'], capability_match=['hardware_oob','thermal_detail'], device_types=['ilo','server_oob']

ClientOverviewPage.js lines 362-466: IloServerCard correctly computes storageStale from storage_controllers[].stale or drives[].stale, shows 'Storage (cache)' label with violet color (#A78BFA) and tooltip when stale
seed_data_creation: Re-seeded ilo-fan-critical runbook with updated profile_keys and capability_match fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: HPE iLO stale-but-good fallback feature fully tested. Key points: (1) hpe_ilo profile has 44 OIDs + 17 Redfish endpoints + gen9/10/11 metadata, (2) fingerprint API returns profile in 'profile.key' field (not top-level 'key'), (3) _keep_if_empty() in redfish.py marks items with stale=true when new poll returns empty but previous had data, (4) ilo-fan-critical runbook now has profile_keys=['hpe_ilo'] and capability_match=['hardware_oob','thermal_detail'], (5) Frontend IloServerCard shows 'Storage (cache)' with violet color when storageStale=true.

fingerprint_api.sysdescr_ilo6_gen11: PASS - 'Integrated Lights-Out 6 Firmware HPE ProLiant Gen11' → hpe_ilo

stale_fallback_logic.prev_empty_new_full: PASS - returns new list without stale flag

frontend_ui.fingerprint_modal: PASS - working with sysObjectID and sysDescr inputs
